examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Local printer mapping stale. Fix: Clear queue and reinstall printer mapping.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Stale local printer mapping. Fix: Removed and re-added the printer.

examples.query: Production environment for internal app is unavailable.
examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Application service down. Fix: Restarted failed service and brought it back online.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Critical application service on the server had stopped. Fix: Restarted the failed service and the environment came back online.

examples.query: Installer fails due to incorrect deployment scope
examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Application not targeted correctly. Fix: Corrected deployment scope and install completed successfully.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Application not targeted correctly. Fix: Corrected deployment scope and install completed successfully.

examples.query: Two-factor login failing on phone app
examples.gold_resolution: Cause: MFA token drifted out of sync. Fix: Resynced the MFA token.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Device token out of sync. Fix: Reset MFA enrollment and re-register authenticator app.

examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Email matched known phishing pattern. Fix: Message removed from mailboxes, no compromise steps required.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Email matched known phishing pattern. Fix: Message removed from mailboxes, no compromise.

examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Critical application service on the server had stopped. Fix: Restarted the failed service and the environment came back online.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Critical application service on the server had stopped. Fix: Restarted the failed service and the environment came back online.

examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Corrupted local profile data. Fix: Rebuilt application's local profile data.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Local application cache corrupted. Fix: Reset local application cache.

examples.query: Reset link expired and not working
examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Previous token expired. Fix: Generated fresh password reset link.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Previous token expired. Fix: Generated fresh password reset link.

examples.query: Received a suspicious email that looked internal but was phishing.
examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Email matched known phishing pattern. Fix: Quarantined message and blocked similar sender patterns.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Email matched known phishing pattern. Fix: Message removed from mailboxes, no compromise.

examples.query: Computer reboots with blue screen before sign-in.
examples.gold_resolution: Cause: Faulty driver update. Fix: Removed bad driver and applied approved version.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Security-state change after device restart. Fix: Provided recovery key and unlocked device.
